title: TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine
innovation_summary: TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine: We propose TREK (Teacher-Routed Exploration via Forward KL), a simple staged procedure that uses distillation not for imitation but for exploration support expansion.
